name: fermion-live-streaming
description: Live streaming application with WebRTC and HLS - Fermion Assignment

scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter backend lint && pnpm --filter frontend lint
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter backend type-check && pnpm --filter frontend type-check
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm --filter backend install && pnpm --filter frontend install

author: Akshaya Parida
